steps.title: Suspend fetch

steps.title: Sequential run
steps.instructions: Call fetches one by one in `main`.

snippets.label: Main.kt
snippets.code:
import kotlinx.coroutines.runBlocking

fun main() = runBlocking {
    val a = fetchHeadline(1)
    val b = fetchHeadline(2)
    println(a)
    println(b)
}
